arts.ttl: Brentford forward Yoane Wissa ruled out for a 'couple of months' after suffering an ankle injury during defeat by Man City
arts.sum: Wissa opened the scoring inside opening 30 seconds against Manchester City on Saturday, but was then substituted just before half-time following a challenge with Mateo Kovacic.

arts.ttl: Brentford suffer Yoane Wissa injury blow as boss Thomas Frank provides update
arts.sum: The Bees striker scored in Saturday's defeat against Manchester City before being taken off before the break with an ankle problem

arts.ttl: Brentford star Wissa faces lengthy spell out
arts.sum: Bees news. The post Brentford star Wissa faces lengthy spell out appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Preview: Brentford vs. Leyton Orient - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's EFL Cup clash between Brentford and Leyton Orient, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
